name: lean-ctx
description: Context Runtime for AI Agents — 61 MCP tools, 10 read modes, 60+ shell patterns, tree-sitter AST for 18 languages. Compresses LLM context by up to 99%. Use when reading files, running shell commands, searching code, or exploring directories. Auto-installs if not present.
author: yvgude
summary_zh: 专为AI代理打造的上下文压缩工具，在读取文件、搜索代码或执行命令时，能把大模型上下文压缩99%，解决输入过长导致的信息过载与性能问题。
